creator: yklaxds@gmail.com
text:
It works fine with gnome 3.3x, loading gnome desktop. But gnome 41 under wayland startup stuck in gdm.The mouse is stuck and can't move, and the keyboard doesn't work.

FreeBSD 13.0.

——————————————————————————————————————
